name: Impact Analytics
prompt: Generate Lucy's impact analytics dashboard. Calculate: 1) Total signals processed (from scanner_get_stats), 2) Time saved estimate (2 min per triaged signal, 5 min per dig deep, 3 min per briefing), 3) Signals by priority (high/medium/low counts), 4) Top 5 senders (from signal data), 5) Actions taken (reviewed + acted count). Format as a briefing card grid with large numbers and short labels. If no data, show 'No analytics yet — run a scan first.'
